title: Bulk import to D1 using REST API
excerpt: description: This tutorial uses the REST API to import a database into D1. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to import a database into D1 using the [REST API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api/resources/d1/subresources/database/methods/import/). 1.
